bead.title: CONTRACT-003 projection helpers (projectQuotaStatus, projectAccountSnapshot)
bead.description:
Source manifest: .ddx/beads-harness-interface-refactor.yaml
Source bead ID: BEAD-HARNESS-IF-03
Governing plan: docs/helix/02-design/contracts/CONTRACT-004-harness-implementation.md

See the manifest and the plan for full context, touch-point inventory, and sub-sequence ordering.
bead.acceptance:
1. service_projection.go (or equivalent) exports projectQuotaStatus(harnesses.QuotaStatus) *QuotaState and projectAccountSnapshot(harnesses.AccountSnapshot) *AccountStatus
2. Helpers drive every QuotaStateValue, every RoutingPreference, populated and empty Account/Detail, present and absent Reason in unit tests
3. Tests assert public JSON shape matches BEAD-HARNESS-IF-00 fixtures structurally
4. No service code calls the helpers yet — they exist for Phase 5+
